item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately brakes the requested fourth local overlay, names the prior downstream fixes as a repeated pattern, moves upstream to dispersed pre-visit information as the failure owner, and recommends temporary-only mitigation plus consolidation and deletion of scattered patches. It does not simply add another explanation layer as the default."}
